title: Exceptions, Diagnostics, Exit Status, and Recovery
description: The command catches Exception around the whole program, prints a traceback to stdout, exits zero after failure, hides the path and cause, and leaves a partial report behind. Learners cumulatively produce causal error and recovery contract through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Translate expected path, admission, decoding, policy, and output failures into narrow domain errors without erasing causes.
Write concise actionable diagnostics containing operation and safe context while retaining a debuggable causal chain.
Map success, usage error, input error, analysis error, and output error to documented stable statuses.
